name: Zippy Shrimp Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Cream Cheese, softened (3 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add shrimp and cook for 3 to 5 minutes, or until the shrimp turn pink.
3. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
4. Peel and devein the shrimp. Reserve 3 shrimp for garnish; coarsely chop the remaining shrimp. Set aside.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and remaining ingredients. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until blended.
6. Stir in chopped shrimp.
7. Spoon shrimp mixture into a small serving bowl. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours.
8. Garnish with reserved whole shrimp. Serve with assorted crackers.
